info.title: Zenefits (TriNet) API
info.description: Zenefits (now TriNet) Platform and Core APIs providing access to companies, people, employments, departments, locations, bank accounts, custom fields, time off, time and attendance, and application platform capabilities.

get.description: Returns applications installed on the platform
